speaker: Manfred Weber
text: The EPP firewall against far-right and nationalist parties is non-negotiable: cooperation requires the 'three pros' — pro-Europe, pro-Ukraine, pro-rule of law — and parties like AfD or Orbán's Fidesz fail this test.
context: Cited Schuman, Adenauer, Havel, Wałęsa as EPP heritage; noted he personally expelled Orbán from the EPP group.

addressed_in_artifacts.voice_name: Plato son of Ariston, of the deme Collytus — though when I write I withdraw my name from the page; you will hear me only through Socrates and the others.
